name: Kimchi
description: $Kimchi is a memecoin that is launched in honor of the dog, Kimchi, which made history as the first Shiba Inu to represent the Dogecoin community on the big stage at Nasdaq New York City. Now, she's live on Ethereum. From a humble #ChooseMyShibe contest to the bright lights of Times Square. Kimchi joined House of Doge at the @NasdaqExchange in NYC to represent the entire community and celebrate the Dogecoin ETF launch.
